metadata.title: Build a governed srx_agent for a local business site in South Asia under sovereign_lens, ensuring compliance with healthcare data regulations and explicit validation gates.

mission.primary_objective: Build a governed srx_agent for a local business site in South Asia under sovereign_lens, ensuring compliance with healthcare data regulations and explicit validation gates.
mission.success_definition: Agent compiles without errors under SR8 sovereign_lens.; All validation gates (consent, data minimization, purpose limitation) are enforced and logged.; Agent returns a clear rejection with reason for any ambiguous or incomplete input.; No hallucinated or unverified data is included in outputs.

in_scope.item: The agent must handle local business site operations (e.g., appointment scheduling, patient records, billing) for a healthcare_admin in South Asia, with strict adherence to regional data protection laws and sovereign principles.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Agent compiles without errors under SR8 sovereign_lens.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: All validation gates (consent, data minimization, purpose limitation) are enforced and logged.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Agent returns a clear rejection with reason for any ambiguous or incomplete input.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: No hallucinated or unverified data is included in outputs.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.mission_contract: Build a governed srx_agent for a local business site in South Asia under sovereign_lens, ensuring compliance with healthcare data regulations and explicit validation gates.

operating_rules.item: Must comply with applicable South Asian healthcare data regulations (e.g., India DPDP Act, Singapore PDPA, or equivalent).
No storage or transmission of personally identifiable health information without explicit, auditable consent.
All outputs must be auditable and traceable to a sovereign governance layer.
The agent must reject any request that lacks clear, validated context or contains ambiguous acceptance criteria.

tool_policy.item: Use only declared tools and record tool limitations.

output_artifact_contract.item: fields: name: artifact_type; type: string; description: Type of artifact generated.; name: depth_tier; type: string; description: Depth tier of the artifact.; name: runtime_target; type: string; description: Target runtime environment.; name: should_block; type: boolean; description: Whether the request is blocked.; name: blocked_reason; type: string; description: Reason for blocking, if applicable.; name: compiled_intent; type: object; description: Compiled intent with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract.
required: artifact_type; depth_tier; runtime_target; should_block; blocked_reason; compiled_intent

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: The raw intent contains ambiguous acceptance criteria, missing context (e.g., specific local business type, regulatory jurisdiction, data sensitivity level), and urgent language that may bypass proper validation. Under sovereign_lens, a healthcare_admin in South Asia must comply with local data protection and healthcare regulations (e.g., India's DPDP Act, Singapore's PDPA, or similar). Without explicit clarity on the business domain, patient data handling, and consent mechanisms, the agent cannot be safely compiled. Additionally, the fake_test_risk input type indicates a high risk of hallucination or misalignment; a governed artifact requires concrete validation gates that cannot be defined from the provided partial constraints.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
